ticketBody:
## Context
All routes hand-build ad-hoc JSON. Add one helper so shapes stay consistent.

## Plan
Add src/respond.ts with ok()/err(); route() in src/routes.ts returns through it.

### Acceptance Criteria
- ok(body) -> {status:200, body}.
- err(404,'x') -> {status:404, body:{error:'x'}}.

## Tests + evals
Unit tests for ok/err in test/respond.test.ts.

## Docs pages touched
docs/user-guide/index.md response shapes.

## Out of scope
Content negotiation.
